setTheLatestCreatedDateFromAllowanceJobR:
WITH sub AS (
  SELECT ctid, ("createdAt" AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS lastcreation
  FROM "AllowanceJobRecord"
  WHERE "tenantId" = 'tenantCode'
  ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC, "allowanceTime" DESC LIMIT 1
) UPDATE "AllowanceJobRecord" a SET "createdAt" = LEAST(sub.lastcreation, ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '1 hour 1 minute')) FROM sub WHERE a.ctid = sub.ctid 
RETURNING a.*, sub.lastcreation AS previous_createdAt,((now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '1 hour 1 minute') AS target_createdAt;
